examples: If you don't want to sound impolite, or cause embarrassment or distress of any kind to the person you're talking to, you should learn to use tactful and tentative forms in your English.
That wasn't a very tactful thing to say!
I tried to find a tactful way of telling her the truth.
Mr Olmert's colleagues, realising that talk of killing was hardly tactful, have played his statement down.
Mr Khatami's own tactful and amiable style has protected him from the fierce assaults that assail his allies.
